name: Turning Point: 9/11 and the War on Terror
original_name: Turning Point: 9/11 and the War on Terror
overview: Modern history can be divided into two time frames: before 9/11 and after 9/11. This five-part docuseries is a cohesive chronicle of the September 11, 2001 attacks on the U.S., offering illuminating perspectives and personal stories of how the catastrophic events of that day changed the course of the nation.

trailers.title: Turning Point: 9/11 and the War on Terror | Official Trailer | Netflix
